findings.finding: Poisson prediction intervals were incorrectly capped at 30 events per 30 opponent passes.
findings.scientific_consequence: Upper confidence limits could be truncated and uncertainty understated.
findings.validation: Regression implementation now caps only binomial probabilities; full tests pass.

findings.finding: Post-regain xG/xT construction used a boolean short-circuit expression instead of direct opportunity normalization.
findings.scientific_consequence: Exploratory post-regain values could be constructed incorrectly.
findings.validation: Values are divided directly by positive five-second pressure regains; secondary models execute.

findings.finding: Material Poisson overdispersion initially lacked the preregistered NB2 robustness execution.
findings.scientific_consequence: Count-model robustness to variance misspecification would be incomplete.
findings.validation: Dispersion=1.603 triggered a separately preserved match-clustered NB2 robustness model.

findings.finding: The locked design matrix is rank deficient by one column because stage and matchday indicators overlap.
findings.scientific_consequence: Generalized-inverse estimates are reproducible, but individual nuisance coefficients are not uniquely parameterized.
findings.validation: Primary contrasts converge and the rank warning is explicit; changing the locked formula post-estimate was avoided.

findings.finding: Full residual diagnostics are not recomputed for each robustness-grid variant.
findings.scientific_consequence: Per-variant influence and dispersion comparisons are limited.
findings.validation: Every variant is preserved with sample, clustering, convergence, and an explicit diagnostic limitation.
